## Validation

- [ ] I inspected the relevant diff.
- [ ] I ran validation appropriate to the change.
- [ ] I updated docs/state files if repository truth changed.

## Portability & Safety

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, private hosts, or local-only absolute paths.
- [ ] No project-specific skill content was added to the generic library.
- [ ] License/provenance files were preserved for imported material.
